summary.intent: Migrate the Jenkins 'release-from-fbc' pipeline to Tekton/Konflux and troubleshoot authentication and configuration issues to get it running successfully on the cluster.
summary.outcome: Fixed oras authentication via Docker config symlink, added missing ELLIOTT_DATA_PATH and DOOZER_DATA_PATH environment variables, populated the konflux-sa-kubeconfigs secret with all required kubeconfigs, and progressed the pipeline past initial failures to a new error in the layered-products-scan step.

repo: oras commands in artcommonlib/util.py (lines 819, 877) don't pass auth flags and rely on DOCKER_CONFIG env var or ~/.docker/config.json
artcd Task expects kubeconfig keys: ocp, oadp, mta, mtc, logging, assisted-installer

Jenkins credentials map to specific IDs: openshift-bot-ocp-konflux-service-account, openshift-bot-oadp-konflux-service-account, openshift-bot-mta-konflux-service-account, openshift-bot-mtc-konflux-service-account, openshift-bot-logging-konflux-service-account
Elliott and Doozer require ELLIOTT_DATA_PATH and DOOZER_DATA_PATH pointing to https://github.com/openshift-eng/ocp-build-data
cmd_gather_async inherits environment variables from parent process, so DOCKER_CONFIG propagates through subprocess calls

code.finding: oras discover command lacks auth configuration flags
oras pull command lacks auth configuration flags

workflow: Tekton v1 Pipeline parameters only support string, array, and object types - no textarea for multi-line inputs
Tekton array parameters can only be expanded in args fields using $(params.name[*]), not in script blocks
oras may require explicit /root/.docker/config.json symlink even when DOCKER_CONFIG env var is set
OpenShift Console may generate v1beta1 PipelineRuns when using array parameters, causing API version mismatch with v1 pipelines
oc apply warning about missing kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration annotation is harmless and auto-fixed

friction: oras authentication failed with only DOCKER_CONFIG set - required explicit symlink to /root/.docker/config.json
Tekton string parameters render as single-line inputs in OpenShift Console, truncating long fbc-pullspecs values
Array parameter type caused API version mismatch (v1beta1 vs v1) preventing PipelineRun creation from Console UI
konflux-sa-kubeconfigs secret was incomplete - only had oadp key, missing ocp, mta, mtc, logging
ELLIOTT_DATA_PATH and DOOZER_DATA_PATH were configured in devcontainer but missing from production Tekton environment
open_items: New error in layered-products-scan pipeline needs investigation
assisted-installer kubeconfig key referenced in artcd Task but no corresponding Jenkins credential exists
artcd.toml is created empty in Tekton whereas Jenkins uses proper config with ocp-build-data URL
